version_upgrade_rule: V1 → V1.1 → V1.2 → V2.0 → V3.0 → V4.0 → V5.0 → V6.0 → V7.0 progression. NO DIRECT PATCHES ALLOWED OUTSIDE VERSION SYSTEM.
system_behavior_after_freeze: REJECTED - SYSTEM IS FROZEN. REQUIRE VERSION BUMP.
system_principle: This is a CIVILIZATION SIMULATION SYSTEM. Users are participants in evolution, not consumers.
forbidden_changes: adding new pages outside version system
bypassing product pipeline for product creation
bypassing world pipeline for world creation
bypassing reality pipeline for reality augmentation
bypassing civilization pipeline for civilization simulation
creating world nodes without physical mapping or AR trigger or geo anchor
treating users as consumers instead of civilization participants
manually designing UI when product requires new capability
manually designing product when world requires new capability
allowed_changes: design token value updates WITH consistency re-check
score threshold adjustments WITH version note
product intent role mapping updates WITH version note
product module configuration updates WITH version note
product state machine transition rules WITH version note
world region template updates WITH version note
world layer configuration updates WITH version note
physical location coordinate updates WITH version note
trigger definition adjustments WITH version note
world connection weight adjustments WITH version note
civilization evolution loop parameters WITH version note
